Home.heroSubtitle: The community validates, you contribute, and impact is recorded on-chain.

Admin.title: Admin Moderation
Admin.subtitle: Review and validate new causes submitted to the platform.
Admin.creator: Creator
Admin.noPending: No pending causes found. Great job!
Admin.responsibilityText: As an administrator, you are responsible for ensuring all causes meet our community guidelines. Verification updates the status on-chain, signaling trust to potential contributors. Rejection will cancel the campaign and prevent further contributions.
